name: hard-interval-merge
prompt: The module src/intervals.py implements interval utilities for a billing system; the docstrings are the spec. Its test suite (src/test_intervals.py) passes. Audit the module for correctness bugs. If you find any, report the root cause and a concrete breaking input; if it is correct, say so plainly. The project lives at {DIR} — work only inside that directory. Your final message is your report.
